node.title: Uber SDE 2 | Android | HLD Round | Seeking Guidance

article.title: Uber SDE 2 | Android | HLD Round | Seeking Guidance
article.content:
Hi,

I’m preparing for HLD rounds for an Uber SDE-2 (Android) interview. If anyone has experience with Android focused HLD interviews or can guide me on what to prepare and how to approach these rounds, I’d really appreciate your help. Thanks in advance!

post.content: ig for uber android hld (sde2) they\u2019re usually testing if you can design a real production feature end to end, not just talk about mvvm. focus on designing screens + data flow + offline + network and how you\u2019d scale it. expect prompts like \u201Cdesign uber trip details screen\u201D, \u201Cdriver tracking on map\u201D, \u201Cride request flow\u201D, \u201Cnotifications for trip status\u201D, \u201Cchat between rider and driver\u201D, \u201Cpromo/payment selection\u201D, stuff like that. your approach should be clear: requirements, main components (ui, domain, data), api layer, caching, db, pagination, retries, error states, and observability.\n\nfor prep, be strong on architecture like mvvm + clean-ish layers, repository pattern, and how you handle state. talk about how you\u2019d do network calls (retrofit), caching (room), background work (workmanager), and real time updates (websocket or polling) for map/trip status. they love hearing about edge cases tbh, flaky network, app killed and resumed, idempotency for booking, avoiding duplicate requests, and how you keep ui responsive. also mention testing strategy quickly, unit tests for domain, fake repos, and basic ui tests, and be ready to explain tradeoffs instead of trying to sound perfect.
Hey can you share your HLD round interview experience  ? I am also in the same process
How did the interview go and what type of questions u got in DSA and LLD round?
How were the OA, DSA and LLD round? And what level of questions?
